message:
feat(cli): add spawn order context for agent coordination (ntm-39os)

Add SpawnContext and AgentSpawnContext types to communicate spawn position
to each agent. Sets NTM_SPAWN_ORDER, NTM_SPAWN_TOTAL, and NTM_SPAWN_BATCH_ID
environment variables for agents to self-coordinate. Also annotates staggered
prompts with spawn context for LLM awareness.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
